summary: Feature removal and Services tutorial testing complete. All 13 test cases passed. Verified: 1) Meetings and Notes removed from admin sidebar, 2) Meet removed from portal nav, 3) Removed routes (/meetings, /notes, /portal/meetings, /portal/prayer) redirect to login, 4) Services page Publish button visible for draft plans, 5) Services tutorial panel with 6 sections working correctly, 6) No regressions in dashboard or portal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature removal testing complete. Meetings, Notes, and Prayer features successfully removed from UI. Services page tutorial and Publish button working correctly.

admin_sidebar_notes_removed.details: Notes nav item no longer appears in admin sidebar PEOPLE section

services_status_workflow.details: Tutorial mentions Draft → Published → Live → Completed workflow

services_publish_button.details: Green 'Publish' button visible for draft service plans
